steps.title: Use the study finding
steps.content: The researchers found that performance expectancy, or the perceived benefit of a paid streaming service, positively influences users' intention to adopt premium versions. A logical conclusion should apply that relationship without claiming more than the study showed.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported scope
steps.content: Choice A wrongly says no other factors matter. Choice B shifts to Spotify loyalty, which was not compared. Choice C attacks the study's measure even though the researchers used it to assess perceived benefit. The reasonable application is to influence how beneficial premium service seems. The answer is D.
